title: croton loukandensis
intro: Croton loukandensis, also known as Loukandesi or Katuk, is a species of plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae) native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing cholesterol levels, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Croton loukandensis may include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to take advantage of its purported medicinal properties.
